response: 22861 is prime. It has no divisors up to its square root (≈151.2).
reasoning_content: We need to check if 22861 is prime. Quick sanity check: sqrt(22861) ≈ 151.2 (since 150^2=22500, 151^2=22801, 152^2=23104). So we need to test primes up to 151. First, check divisibility by small primes: 2: no, odd; 3: sum digits 2+2+8+6+1=19, not divisible by 3; 5: doesn't end in 0 or 5; 7: 7*3265=22855, remainder 6, so not divisible; 11: alternating sum 2-2+8-6+1=3, not divisible by 11; 13: 13*1758=22854, remainder 7; 17: 17*1345=22865, too high? Actually 17*1344=22848, remainder 13; 19: 19*1203=22857, remainder 4; 23: 23*994=22862, too high, 23*993=22839, remainder 22; 29: 29*788=22852, remainder 9; 31: 31*737=22847, remainder 14; 37: 37*618=22866, too high, 37*617=22829, remainder 32; 41: 41*557=22837, remainder 24; 43: 43*531=22833, remainder 28; 47: 47*486=22842, remainder 19; 53: 53*431=22843, remainder 18; 59: 59*387=22833, remainder 28; 61: 61*374=22814, remainder 47; 67: 67*341=22847, remainder 14; 71: 71*322=22862, too high, 71*321=22791, remainder 70; 73: 73*313=22849, remainder 12; 79: 79*289=22831, remainder 30; 83: 83*275=22825, remainder 36; 89: 89*257=22873, too high, 89*256=22784, remainder 77; 97: 97*235=22795, remainder 66; 101: 101*226=22826, remainder 35; 103: 103*222=22866, too high, 103*221=22763, remainder 98; 107: 107*213=22791, remainder 70; 109: 109*209=22781, remainder 80; 113: 113*202=22826, remainder 35; 127: 127*180=22860, remainder 1; 131: 131*174=22794, remainder 67; 137: 137*166=22742, remainder 119; 139: 139*164=22796, remainder 65; 149: 149*153=22797, remainder 64; 151: 151*151=22801, remainder 60. So no divisors. Thus 22861 is prime. Answer: yes, it's prime.
